    \<div class="page-section blog-page"\>  
        \<div class="wrapper"\>  
            \<div class="blog-page\_\_top"\>  
                \<div class="section\_\_title--lg"\>  
                    Datenschutzerklärung  
                \</div\>  
                \<div class="blog-page\_\_date"\>  Mar 28, 2025\</div\>  
            \</div\>

        \</div\>  
    \</div\>  
    \<div class="blog-page\_\_content"\>  
        \<div class="bg\_\_parallax"\>  
            \<div class="wrapper"\>  
                \<div class="blog-page\_\_content--text text\_\_area--big"\>  
                    \<p\>\<span data-metadata="\<\!--(figmeta)eyJmaWxlS2V5IjoiMkh0RDR1cWk5TDZ5NVR3b0toRm00UCIsInBhc3RlSUQiOjEzOTMxNjMyODEsImRhdGFUeXBlIjoic2NlbmUifQo=(/figmeta)--\>"\>\</span\>\<span data-buffer="\<\!--(figma)(/figma)--\>"\>\</span\>\<span style="white-space-collapse: preserve;"\>What sets K-Aqua apart from other content creators is their distinct personality and style. Whether it's through their witty commentary, captivating storytelling, or infectious energy, K-Aqua has a natural ability to connect with their audience. This ability to forge a genuine connection is what makes K-Aqua's content so relatable and enjoyable to watch. Viewers can expect to be entertained, inspired, and perhaps even challenged by the unique perspectives that K-Aqua brings to the table.\</span\>\</p\>\<p\>\<span data-metadata="\<\!--(figmeta)eyJmaWxlS2V5IjoiMkh0RDR1cWk5TDZ5NVR3b0toRm00UCIsInBhc3RlSUQiOjEyOTE1NzAwMDEsImRhdGFUeXBlIjoic2NlbmUifQo=(/figmeta)--\>"\>\</span\>\<span data-buffer="\<\!--(figma)(/figma)--\>"\>\</span\>\<span style="white-space-collapse: preserve;"\>In addition to their captivating content, K-Aqua is known for their commitment to community engagement. Demonstrating a genuine passion for their craft, K-Aqua regularly interacts with their followers through social media platforms, responding to comments and addressing questions. This level of engagement fosters a strong sense of community among their fans, further enhancing the viewing experience and making K-Aqua's channel highly anticipated among online audiences.  As the launch of K-Aqua's YouTube channel approaches, the anticipation continues to build. With a combination of experience, charisma, and a commitment to community engagement, K-Aqua is poised to make a significant impact in the online video community. Whether it's music, fashion, lifestyle, or something entirely new, K-Aqua's content is sure to leave a lasting impression on viewers and cement their place as a prominent figure in the YouTube landscape. Stay tuned for the exciting journey ahead on K-Aqua's YouTube channel Ã¢â‚¬â€œ it's surely something you won't want to miss\!\</span\>\<br\>\</p\>\<p\>\<br\>\<span data-metadata="\<\!--(figmeta)eyJmaWxlS2V5IjoiMkh0RDR1cWk5TDZ5NVR3b0toRm00UCIsInBhc3RlSUQiOjE5Mjc0MjY3NTIsImRhdGFUeXBlIjoic2NlbmUifQo=(/figmeta)--\>"\>\</span\>\</p\>  
                \</div\>  
            \</div\>  
        \</div\>  
    \</div\>  
    \<div class="maps-form"\>  
    \<div class="maps-form\_\_maps"\>  
        \<iframe      src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=\!1m18\!1m12\!1m3\!1d2541.657996493376\!2d8.495365176935538\!3d50.428843388918764\!2m3\!1f0\!2f0\!3f0\!3m2\!1i1024\!2i768\!4f13.1\!3m3\!1m2\!1s0x47bc524adf798b15%3A0x470fe485d1358047\!2sK-Aqua%20Kessel%20Wassertechnologie%20GmbH\!5e0\!3m2\!1sen\!2sam\&hl=en"      width="600"      height="450"      style="border:0; filter: invert(90%)"      allowfullscreen=""      loading="lazy"      referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"\> \</iframe\>  
    \</div\>

                    \</div\>  
                    \<div class="form\_\_block"\>  
                        \<input type="submit" class="form\_\_submit btn\_\_style btn\_\_style--big-text" value="Senden"\>  
                    \</div\>  
                \</div\>  
            \</form\>  
        \</div\>

\<div class="modal" id="modal-form" \>  
    \<div class="modal\_\_content"\>  
        \<div class="modal\_\_block"\>  
            \<div class="modal\_\_close"\>  
                \<svg width="36px" height="36px" viewBox="-0.5 0 25 25" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"\>\<g id="SVGRepo\_bgCarrier" stroke-width="0"\>\</g\>\<g id="SVGRepo\_tracerCarrier" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"\>\</g\>\<g id="SVGRepo\_iconCarrier"\> \<path d="M3 21.32L21 3.32001" stroke="\#ffffff" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"\>\</path\> \<path d="M3 3.32001L21 21.32" stroke="\#ffffff" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"\>\</path\> \</g\>\</svg\>  
            \</div\>  
            \<div class="modal\_\_title"\>  
                Hinterlassen Sie Ihre Kontaktdaten \<br\> und wir rufen Sie zurück\!  
            \</div\>  
            \<div class="modal\_\_form"\>  
                \<form class="form order"\>  
                    \<input type="hidden" name="\_token" value="l7CiSnlq8qy7tuyovsEVLuHJgrZPUQhVjcH2RFAb" autocomplete="off"\>                    \<div class="form\_\_flex flex-block form\_\_flex--column"\>  
                        \<input name="title\_product" type="hidden" value=""\>  
                        \<input name="slag" type="hidden" value="https://project-301.webtm.ru/de/privacy-policy"\>  
                        \<input name="lang" type="hidden" value="de"\>  
                        \<div class="form\_\_block"\>  
                            \<input name="name" type="text" class="form\_\_input" placeholder=" Name" required\>  
                        \</div\>  
                        \<div class="form\_\_block"\>  
                            \<input name="phone" type="tel" class="form\_\_input" placeholder=" Telefon" required\>  
                        \</div\>  
                        \<div class="form\_\_block"\>  
                            \<input name="email" type="email" class="form\_\_input" placeholder=" E-Mail" required\>  
                        \</div\>  
                        \<div class="form\_\_block"\>  
                            \<input type="submit" class="form\_\_submit btn\_\_style btn\_\_style--big-text" value="Senden"\>  
                        \</div\>  
                    \</div\>  
                \</form\>  
            \</div\>  
        \</div\>  
    \</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="open-thank-you-popup"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="modal" id="modal-thank-you" \>  
    \<div class="modal\_\_content"\>  
        \<div class="modal\_\_block"\>  
            \<div class="modal\_\_close"\>  
                \<svg width="36px" height="36px" viewBox="-0.5 0 25 25" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"\>\<g id="SVGRepo\_bgCarrier" stroke-width="0"\>\</g\>\<g id="SVGRepo\_tracerCarrier" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"\>\</g\>\<g id="SVGRepo\_iconCarrier"\> \<path d="M3 21.32L21 3.32001" stroke="\#ffffff" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"\>\</path\> \<path d="M3 3.32001L21 21.32" stroke="\#ffffff" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"\>\</path\> \</g\>\</svg\>  
            \</div\>  
            \<div class="modal\_\_thank-you"\>  
                \<div class="modal\_\_thank-you--title"\>Danke\! \</div\>  
                \<p\>Wir werden uns bald bei Ihnen melden\!\</p\>  
            \</div\>  
        \</div\>  
    \</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<script src='https://project-301.webtm.ru/assets/js/jquery-3.7.1.min.js'\>\</script\>  
\<script src='https://project-301.webtm.ru/assets/js/slick.min.js'\>\</script\>  
\<script src='https://project-301.webtm.ru/assets/js/lenis.min.js'\>\</script\>  
\<script src='https://project-301.webtm.ru/assets/js/swiper-bundle.min.js'\>\</script\>  
\<script src='https://project-301.webtm.ru/assets/js/fancybox.umd.js'\>\</script\>  
\<script src='https://project-301.webtm.ru/assets/js/gsap.min.js'\>\</script\>  
\<script src='https://project-301.webtm.ru/assets/js/TweenMax.min.js'\>\</script\>  
\<script src="https://project-301.webtm.ru/assets/js/index.min.js"\>\</script\>  
\<script src="https://project-301.webtm.ru/assets/js/mixitup.min.js"\>\</script\>  
\<script src='https://project-301.webtm.ru/assets/js/main.js'\>\</script\>  
    \<script type="text/javascript"\>  
        $(document).ready(function (){  
            jQuery('.order').submit(function (e) {  
                e.preventDefault();  
                formpar \= jQuery(this).parent();  
                form \= jQuery(this);  
                jQuery.ajax({  
                    url: "https://project-301.webtm.ru/de/leave/order",  
                    type: 'POST',  
                    encoding: "UTF-8",  
                    data: form.serialize(),  
                    dataType: 'json',  
                    success:   (data) \=\> {  
                        if (data.success \!= "error") {  
                            $(".open-thank-you-popup").click();  
                            return true;  
                        } else {  
                            alert("Etwas ist schief gelaufen, bitte versuchen Sie es erneut\!");  
                        }  
                    }  
                })  
            });

            jQuery('.leavecontact').submit(function (e) {  
                e.preventDefault();  
                formpar \= jQuery(this).parent();  
                form \= jQuery(this);  
                jQuery.ajax({  
                    url: "https://project-301.webtm.ru/de/leave/leavecontact",  
                    type: 'POST',  
                    encoding: "UTF-8",  
                    data: form.serialize(),  
                    dataType: 'json',  
                    success:   (data) \=\> {  
                        if (data.success \!= "error") {  
                            $(".open-thank-you-popup").click();  
                            return true;  
                        } else {  
                            alert("Etwas ist schief gelaufen, bitte versuchen Sie es erneut\!");  
                        }  
                    }  
                })  
            });  
            jQuery('.copanyinfo').submit(function (e) {  
                e.preventDefault();  
                formpar \= jQuery(this).parent();  
                form \= jQuery(this);  
                jQuery.ajax({  
                    url: "https://project-301.webtm.ru/de/leave/companyinfo",  
                    type: 'POST',  
                    encoding: "UTF-8",  
                    data: form.serialize(),  
                    dataType: 'json',  
                    success:   (data) \=\> {  
                        if (data.success \!= "error") {  
                            $(".open-thank-you-popup").click();  
                            return true;  
                        } else {  
                            alert("Etwas ist schief gelaufen, bitte versuchen Sie es erneut\!");  
                        }  
                    }  
                })  
            });  
        })  
    \</script\>  
\<\!-- Google Analytics Code \--\>  
    \<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=YOUR\_TRACKING\_ID"\>\</script\>  
    \<script\>  
        window.dataLayer \= window.dataLayer || \[\];  
        function gtag() {  
            dataLayer.push(arguments);  
        }  
        gtag('js', new Date());

        gtag('config', 'YOUR\_TRACKING\_ID');  
    \</script\>  
\<div class="marketing"\>\</div\>

\<div id="cookie-consent-banner" class="cookie-banner" style="display: none;"\>  
    \<div class="wrapper"\>  
        \<p\>We use cookies to improve your experience on our website. You can accept all cookies or customize your preferences.\</p\>  
        \<div class="cookie-banner\_\_flex flex-block"\>  
            \<button id="accept-all-cookies" class="btn\_\_style btn\_\_style--min-w"\>Accept All Cookies\</button\>  
            \<button id="customize-cookies" class="btn\_\_style btn\_\_style--min-w"\>Customize Settings\</button\>  
        \</div\>  
    \</div\>

\</div\>  
\<div id="cookie-settings-modal" class="modal" style="display: none;"\>  
    \<div class="modal\_\_content"\>  
        \<div class="modal\_\_block"\>  
            \<div class="modal\_\_title"\>Cookie Preferences\</div\>  
            \<div class="modal\_\_form"\>  
                \<form id="cookie-settings-form"\>  
                    \<div class="form\_\_flex flex-block form\_\_flex--column"\>  
                        \<div class="form\_\_block"\>  
                            \<div class="form\_\_block--check"\>  
                                \<input type="checkbox" name="essential" id="essential-check" checked="" disabled=""\>  
                                \<label for="essential-check"\>  
                                    Essential Cookies (required)  
                                \</label\>

                            \</div\>  
                        \</div\>  
                        \<div class="form\_\_block"\>  
                            \<div class="form\_\_block--check"\>  
                                \<input type="checkbox" name="analytics" id="analytics-check"\>  
                                \<label for="analytics-check"\>  
                                    Analytics Cookies  
                                \</label\>

                            \</div\>

                        \</div\>  
                        \<div class="form\_\_block"\>  
                            \<div class="form\_\_block--check"\>  
                                \<input type="checkbox" name="marketing" id="marketing-check"\>  
                                \<label for="marketing-check"\>  
                                    Marketing Cookies  
                                \</label\>

                            \</div\>

                        \</div\>  
                        \<div class="form\_\_block"\>  
                            \<button type="submit" class="form\_\_submit btn\_\_style"\>Save Preferences\</button\>  
                        \</div\>  
                    \</div\>  
                \</form\>  
            \</div\>  
        \</div\>  
    \</div\>  
\</div\>

\<script\>  
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {  
        var cookieBanner \= document.getElementById('cookie-consent-banner');  
        var cookieSettingsModal \= document.getElementById('cookie-settings-modal');

        if (\!getCookie('cookieConsent')) {  
            cookieBanner.style.display \= 'block';  
        }

        document.getElementById('accept-all-cookies').addEventListener('click', function() {  
            setCookie('cookieConsent', 'all', 365);  
            cookieBanner.style.display \= 'none';  
        });

        document.getElementById('customize-cookies').addEventListener('click', function() {  
            cookieSettingsModal.style.display \= 'block';  
            cookieSettingsModal.classList.add("active");  
        });

        document.getElementById('cookie-settings-form').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {  
            e.preventDefault();  
            var consent \= \[\];  
            if (document.querySelector('input\[name="analytics"\]').checked) {  
                consent.push('analytics');  
            }  
            if (document.querySelector('input\[name="marketing"\]').checked) {  
                consent.push('marketing');  
            }  
            setCookie('cookieConsent', consent.join(','), 365);  
            cookieBanner.style.display \= 'none';  
            cookieSettingsModal.style.display \= 'none';  
            cookieSettingsModal.classList.remove("active");  
        });

        function setCookie(name, value, days) {  
            var expires \= "";  
            if (days) {  
                var date \= new Date();  
                date.setTime(date.getTime() \+ (days \* 24 \* 60 \* 60 \* 1000));  
                expires \= "; expires=" \+ date.toUTCString();  
            }  
            document.cookie \= name \+ "=" \+ (value || "") \+ expires \+ "; path=/";  
        }

        function getCookie(name) {  
            var nameEQ \= name \+ "=";  
            var ca \= document.cookie.split(';');  
            for (var i \= 0; i \< ca.length; i++) {  
                var c \= ca\[i\];  
                while (c.charAt(0) \=== ' ') c \= c.substring(1, c.length);  
                if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) \=== 0\) return c.substring(nameEQ.length, c.length);  
            }  
            return null;  
        }  
    });  
\</script\>

\</body\>  
\</html\>
